name: load-balancer
title: OCI Load Balancer — Load Balancer
summary: Creates a flexible-shape OCI Load Balancer (public or private) with backend sets, health checkers, optional static backend registration, session persistence, TLS certificates, and HTTP/TCP listeners.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory freeform tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' freeform tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' freeform tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional freeform tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: compartment_id
module.description: OCID of the compartment for the load balancer.

module.name: subnet_ids
module.description: Subnet OCIDs for the LB. One regional subnet is typical; two AD-specific subnets for AD-redundant deployments.

module.name: is_private
module.description: Whether the LB is private (no public IP).

module.name: shape_min_mbps
module.description: Minimum bandwidth of the flexible shape in Mbps.

module.name: shape_max_mbps
module.description: Maximum bandwidth of the flexible shape in Mbps.

module.name: nsg_ids
module.description: Network security group OCIDs attached to the LB.

module.name: backend_sets
module.type: map(object({ policy = optional(string, "ROUND_ROBIN") health_checker = object({ protocol = string port = number url_path = optional(string, "/") return_code = optional(number, 200) interval_ms = optional(number, 10000) timeout_ms = optional(number, 3000) retries = optional(number, 3) }) session_persistence_cookie = optional(string) backends = optional(map(object({ ip_address = string port = number weight = optional(number, 1) backup = optional(bool, false) })), {}) }))
module.description: Backend sets keyed by logical name with health checkers and optional static backends. Dynamic registration (instance pools) is the consumer's responsibility.

module.name: listeners
module.type: map(object({ port = number protocol = string default_backend_set_key = string certificate_name = optional(string) ssl_verify_peer = optional(bool, false) }))
module.description: Listeners keyed by logical name, each pointing at a default backend set.

module.name: certificates
module.type: map(object({ certificate_pem = string private_key_pem = string ca_certificate_pem = optional(string) }))
module.description: TLS certificates keyed by logical name, referenced by listeners via certificate_name.

outputs.name: lb_address
outputs.description: First IP address of the load balancer (public for public LBs, private otherwise).

outputs.name: listener_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical listener name to listener name on the LB (OCI listeners are LB-scoped, addressed by name).

outputs.name: backend_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical backend set name to backend set name on the LB. Register dynamic backends against these in the consumer root.
